description_long: This nightstand features a simple, modern design with clean, straight lines and a rectangular tabletop. The front side includes a single drawer with a small, round knob handle, providing a subtle yet functional accent. Below the drawer, there is an open shelf for additional storage or display, supported by four straight, sturdy legs. The entire structure appears to be made of painted or laminated wood, giving it a smooth, uniform finish. The nightstand lacks any decorative carvings or embellishments, emphasizing practicality and minimalism. Its compact size makes it suitable for placement in tight spaces, such as beside a bed or against a wall in an urban living environment.
description: A minimalist nightstand with a single drawer, open shelf, and straight legs, finished in a smooth, uniform color. The design is functional and unadorned, ideal for modern urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the drawer with a round knob and the open shelf below.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the tabletop and the open shelf, with no visible drawer handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front but without the drawer handle, showing the back panel and shelf.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the side profile and open shelf.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
